name: Test Coverage Analyser
description: Checks that new code paths introduced by the PR are covered by unit or integration tests. Verifies test file presence and analyses coverage delta.

checks.pass: ✅ __tests__/ directory found — coverage analysis can proceed
checks.fail: ❌ No __tests__/ directory — coverage cannot be measured

checks.prompt: Analyse the pull request diff and determine test coverage: (1) Which new functions or branches lack test coverage? (2) Are existing tests likely to break? (3) What is the estimated coverage delta (+ or - %)? Output structured findings per file.
